task_title: Annotate slide 6 with blue directional arrows

window_merge_decisions.reason: The next step directly continues configuring the same first gradient stop color: it starts from the palette opened in the previous step and proceeds to the custom color dialog for that same control.

The next step directly continues the same gradient-stop color edit: the palette opened in s20 is the visible starting state in s21, and s21 simply drills into the custom color picker for that same second stop.

task_goal: The slide edits are saved to the presentation.

action_preconditions: The edited slide shows one large down arrow and two small up arrows in their final positions.
steps.action_before_state: LibreOffice Impress is open, displaying slide 6 of 23 from a presentation titled “multimedia_classroom_podium-2020.pptx”. The active slide is labeled “Button Style Podium” and features a large title, an image of a podium control panel with labeled buttons (ON/OFF, MUTE ON/OFF, PC/LAPTOP/DOC CAM), a diagram of video/audio ports (HDMI, VGA, AUDIO, USB), two blue upward arrows pointing to the ports, a photo of an audio cable, and descriptive text about connecting a laptop. A vertical slide thumbnail pane on the left shows slides 1–8, with slide 6 selected. The top menu bar includes File, Edit, View, Insert, Format, Slide, Slide Show, Tools, Window, Help. The toolbar below contains standard editing icons. On the right, the Properties panel is open, showing Slide properties (Format: On-screen (4:3), Orientation: Landscape, Background: None) and Layouts thumbnails. The status bar at the bottom indicates “Blank Slide”, page number “21.55 / 3.66”, zoom level “118%”, and language “English (USA)”.
action_after_effects: The presentation is saved with the new arrow annotations.
steps.nl_explanation: Press Ctrl+S to save the updated slide.
